title: WIP - Add driver mismatch error to runtime check
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

If we're checking graph driver and our drivers don't match, i.e. we have vfs and expect overlay or vise versa, throw up an error rather than the default error which isn't terribly helpful.

Addresses #1157

I've made this a WIP as my sandbox is misbehaving and failing to compile on completely unrelated code.   My eyes are too crossed to chase atm, will do so in the morn.  But thought it was worth getting this up in case there were changes for wording or others thought there was a better place to catch this.

I need @mheon to weigh in on the questions/comments he put in that I responded to.
I'm doing some dusting of old PR's today and I'm going to close this one.  As per the final discussions, this error doesn't appear to be needed.  Will circle back if it is found otherwise.
